# No Such Machine / Wuci-Ji

Site: https://nosuchmachine.net/
Repository: https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji
WuciOS 2.4.0 Noether Forge: https://nosuchmachine.net/wucios.html
Noether Forge status: https://nosuchmachine.net/noether-forge-status.json

Public brand:
No Such Machine

Project surface:
Wuci-Ji / 无此机

Official assets:

- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-emblem.svg
- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-emblem.jpg
- https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/no-such-machine-official-banner.jpg

Current public focus:
WuciOS 2.4.0 Noether Forge source-only external review candidate.

Public evidence surface:
Wuci-Ji v2 / Aperture Bastion.

Daylight v20 public challenge poster:
https://nosuchmachine.net/assets/daylight-v20-public-challenge-780thc.jpg

Daylight declaration state:
declaration_allowed = false

Noether Forge is an Alpine-based, TTY-first realization of the Noether Core
profile. Review is anchored to commit
00171c4cbd377f7c3c200c8a2493ad42c90a1207 and PR #30.

Current status:

- distribution mode: source only
- official release: false
- public binary release authorized: false
- binary assets published: false
- substrate: authenticated Alpine Linux 3.24.1 x86_64 inputs
- package closure: 52 locked signed APK payloads fetched directly from upstream
- private repeat builds were byte-identical within one clean checkout and host toolchain
- the exact private image passed QEMU SeaBIOS and OVMF/UEFI gates
- cross-host reproducibility is not established
- reference physical-hardware validation is not established
- external validation received: false
- no Noether Forge ISO, APK payload, package cache, compiled Wuci-Ji binary, kernel, initramfs, modloop, EFI image, firmware, or bootloader binary is published through this review lane

Source-review handles:

- https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/pull/30
- https://github.com/chasebryan/-wuci-ji/blob/00171c4cbd377f7c3c200c8a2493ad42c90a1207/docs/wucios/NOETHER_FORGE_EXTERNAL_REVIEW.md
- make wucios-noether-forge-source-guard
- make wucios-noether-forge-test
- make wucios-validate
- make wucios-noether-forge-fetch
- make wucios-noether-forge-build
- make wucios-noether-forge-verify
- make site-validate

Design history:

- WuciOS v2.4 Reduction Gate separated Noether Core, Birkhoff Bastion, Tarski Review Appliance, and Euclid Substrate Trial
- make wucios-review remains a Reduction Gate history/review command
- the earlier 96.0 / 100.0 Alpine substrate trial score is historical and is not a Noether Forge release score

Non-claims:

- not an official or production WuciOS release
- not binary redistribution authorization
- not production cryptography
- not runtime sandboxing or general OS containment
- not host-cleanliness proof
- not whole-system post-quantum safety
- not FIPS validation
- not government validation
- not external certification
- not independent audit completion
- not cross-host reproducibility
- not reference physical-hardware validation
- not Alpine Linux project endorsement
- not legal advice or an export classification
